summary: Desktop CI built macOS and Windows packages as workflow artifacts but never attached them to the tagged GitHub release.
impact: The desktop-v0.1.0 release page only showed GitHub source archives, so users could not download .dmg/.exe installers directly.
fix: Updated .github/workflows/desktop-build.yml to trigger on desktop-v* tags and publish downloaded matrix artifacts as release assets.
lessons: For release tags, verify workflows include an explicit release upload step instead of relying on Actions artifact retention.
